calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-04-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jennifer Chatman for Defendant/Appellant Bank of America Corporation
Avid Eli Alavi, Esq. (Witherspoon & Siracusa, LLP) for Plaintiff/Respondent Thomas A. Lucas

This cause comes on calendar this day for small claims appeal.

The parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence under oath.
Plaintiff/Respondent introduces the following Exhibits:
1. Letter of Conservatorship, Case No. PCN-10-293809
2. Order Appointing Temporary Conservatorship filed 8/26/10
3. Order Appointing Probate Conservator filed 10/14/20
4. Letter of Conservatorship filed 10/14/20
5. Copy of Check #1767 dated 8/15/19
6. Email Re Wells Fargo checks deposited into your account have been returned, dated 8/20/19
7. Order Terminating Conservatorship filed 7/18/19
8. Bank of America Business Checking Statement from 7/30 - 8/31/11
9. Letter from Bank of America to Estate of Alice A. Harrington an Adult, dated 5/30/19
10. Invoices (Conservatorship and Professional Services)

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Evidence is retained.

Judge Ross C. Moody, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported (606)
